title: General protocol skeleton
description: Blank lab-protocol scaffold: materials, steps, notes, and safety sections ready to fill in.

payload.body:
## Purpose

One or two sentences on what this protocol accomplishes and when to run it.

## Materials

| Item | Catalog / source | Amount per run |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Reagent A | vendor, cat# | 10 mL |
| Reagent B | vendor, cat# | 1 g |
| Consumable | vendor, cat# | 1 each |

## Equipment

- Instrument or setup 1
- Instrument or setup 2

## Steps

1. Step one. Include the measurement (volume, temperature, time).
2. Step two. Note the spin/incubation parameters, e.g. 4000 x g for 5 min at 4 C.
3. Step three.
4. Step four.

## Expected result

What a successful run looks like and how to read it.

## Notes and troubleshooting

- Common failure mode and the fix.
- Variations for different sample types.

## Safety

Hazards, PPE, and disposal notes for the reagents above.
